description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The stylish dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance - perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Case diameter: 34 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsStainless steel case with a crystal encrusted bezelRubber straps with a tang claspBlack dial with the jumping cat logo at the 12 hour markThree time displaysDate aperture at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 100 metres
